Yin Zheng, one of the six young masters of Xin Chuan, who keeps a low profile, and Li Wei, who just wants to work hard and not get selected, live comfortably in this hometown. They unexpectedly form a relationship, and together start a new life where they encounter numerous situations and complement each other in o

programme.title: The Truth About Health - EP 1 / 医点不夸张
programme.desc: The Truth About Health will invite two well-known specialists in each episode, two artists and KOLs to share their experience in fighting the diseases and countering health issues. Host Huang Qianping will use real examples to make the audience more aware of health issues and gain knowledge together!"

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 259
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu Bird's Nest is hand-picked and traditionally brewed to enhance beauty, boost vitality, and restore energy. The Ginseng Bird's Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware’s No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 322
programme.desc: Taste Better, feel better. This premium essence of chicken helps boost energy, stamina, and immunity. Made from 180-day-old hormone-free chickens, it uses high-pressure double-boiling to ensure maximum nutrient absorption. It is 100% pure and natural, with no fat, cholesterol, or preservatives, caramel added.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results

programme.title: Pedal On For Love - EP 6 / 骑心协力
programme.desc: Elvin Ng has never embarked on a long-distance cycling journey until now. For the next seven days, he will pedal from Cambodia to central Thailand under the scorching sun. It is not going to be a smooth journey. Weather aside, Elvin also had to deal with the loss of his loved ones right before the trip and unexpected circumstances during the journey.

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 7 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Zi Cheng blames Zhen Bang for You Yi's death. At the funeral, Zhen Bang meets his father, Ah Hei. Buffett tells Zhen Bang to move back after realizing that he was scammed. Zi Cheng takes over Hui Tou Lu, but his mismanagement results in a decline of business. Han and Ah Lun create trouble for Zi Cheng, who retaliates by setting fire to their territory.

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 8 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Zi Cheng confesses his love to Wen Xin but is haunted by nightmares as he has a guilty conscience. Zi Cheng exploits Tian Yong's amputation for publicity, to the latter's dismay. Meanwhile, Zhen Bang comforts Buffett when she sleepwalks. Zhen Bang begins working as a kitchen assistant for Yan, a head chef who looks like You Yi. Unfortunately, Zhenbang is later arrested as a suspect for arson.

programme.title: (Live) Singapore Today / 狮城六点半
programme.desc: Daily updates on local news headlines and stories.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 439 / 天之骄女
programme.desc: Dali and Kuro trace Tianyou’s voice to an old car and rush with Yufei and Shanghao to the scrapyard. When Qichang learns that evidence has surfaced, he warns Hero to escape.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 440 / 天之骄女
programme.desc: Hero stays silent under pressure and refuses to disclose Tianyou’s location. Furious, Kuro nearly kills him, but the police intervene. Kuro shoulders all the blame and goes with Hero to the station.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 441 / 天之骄女
programme.desc: Jialiang detains Yueli to force out Zixiang’s location, but she feigns innocence and pays the price. When Jiansi arrives and Wenxue begs, Jialiang relents and lets them take her.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Super Taste 48 Hour Burning Desire S3 - EP 1 / 食尚玩家热血48小时
programme.desc: Wei Lian and Fengtian led the audience in a race against time to locate the food places and to complete the missions given to them by the production crew.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 13 / 前线追踪
programme.desc: Frontline is a weekly investigative current affairs programme that aims to address issues closest to the hearts of Singaporeans.

programme.title: SHERO - EP 11
programme.desc: Yinchen and Ruixiang catch Xinya stealing money. Xinya denies betraying Yinxi, but refuses to explain herself for the theft. Yinchen announces to the team that Xinya is the mole, but they still need to find concrete evidence before handing her to the police. Ruixiang finds a bugging device below his desk, and begins to grow suspicion towards Junsheng...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 12
programme.desc: The key evidence finally surfaces, allowing Yinchen and Ruixiang to identify the mole. However, it is still unknown who wanted Yinxi dead. Yinxi manages to recall Yinchen's phone number and tries to contact her. On the 30th anniversary celebration of RSB, Junsheng secretly monitors the interaction between the Yue family and Thomas, while Ruixiang confesses his feelings for Yinchen...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 15 / 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. programme.title: Cut Amirah - EP 6
programme.desc: The drama 'Cut Amirah' starts with the background of the 2004 tsunami in Acheh, progressing to the year 2011. It revolves around the love story and agony of an orphan, Cut Amirah, an Acheh origin, who lost her whole family due to the tsunami which occurred on the very frightful evening at 4pm, 24 December 2004. The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: Menanti Yang Pasti
programme.desc: Haikal tries to fulfill all the dreams of Bella, his only daughter who suffers from congenital heart disease. Before Bella's death, Haikal seemed to celebrate Bella's birthday and milestones that Bella supposedly achieved when she was 16, 17, 18, 21, 23, 24, 28, 29 and 40 years old. Despite having to raise his child alone, Haikal promises to make Bella happy for the rest of his days.

programme.title: Wild Fed
programme.desc: Daniel and Avani harvest cranberries on a floating peat moss island, and they find some long range hunting in the dense Northeastern deer woods.

programme.title: Wild Fed
programme.desc: Daniel joins lifelong friends on a frozen lake to fish below the hard water for landlocked Atlantic salmon, and also searches high in the trees for a chaga mushroom.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: British eccentrics Lou and Gary recently moved to the Yukon and are seeking space for livestock in the gold rush town of Dawson City.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: Friends and bandmates Cindy and Drew look for a Yukon property with mountain views, rehearsal space and a workshop.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

Their happy carefree lives are changed forever when Yukie's ex-boyfriend Suzuki commits an atrocious crime with Mayu as the tragic victim. Half-craze

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.desc: A mother finally passes away after suffering for three years from an unknown disease. With his wife gone, the father leaves the children to go work out of town. Eerie situations soon take place as the children discover that their mother has come back to visit them and is taking them along on her new journey.

But everything suddenly changes when the college decides to suspend Hani after finding out one of the prank victims, Puteri, had attempted to commit suicide when her embarrassing prank video was released online. Now, her gang agree to demote Hani.

On a night full of terror, Rini and her family must save themselves.

programme.title: Live International T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Ireland v India. Coverage of the second and final T20 in the series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast. Coming into this series the visitors had won all eight of their matches in this format against Ireland, with the first game being played back in 2009. The last time they met before this set of matches was at the 2024 T20 World Cup, as India won a group match by eight wickets in New York.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts haven't won the first game in a series against Sri Lanka since an impressive 226-run win over them in a three-match contest back in June 2018.
